since_last: 69% of 89 AI names green; Data Center, Power & Energy leads +1.84%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.68% · BTC +3.01% · Gold +1.90% · Nasdaq100 +0.62%. 69% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Data Center, Power & Energy is doing the heavy lifting at +1.84%.

cards.headline: Data Center, Power & Energy leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.84%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +14.45%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +14.45%, RXRX +5.72%, OKLO +5.47%, OKLO +5.47%, PLTR +5.02%. Laggards: TSLA -3.38%, KLAC -3.31%, META -3.20%, BIDU -2.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.62% at $160.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
